name: percentageCreepExtension
description: Creep strain expressed as a dimensionless ratio (0-1) representing the relative elongation of a material under sustained load.
ExpectedUse: Quantification of time-dependent plastic deformation in creep tests, tensile elongation measurements, and strain-based material characterization.

Properties.Name: percentageCreepExtension
